name: PER_EXT_AUDIT_ACTIONS
description: The table is intended for internal analysis and capture the statistics on fly based on the requirement for various processes.

columns.Name: SEQ_NO
columns.Comments: Sequence number generated in loop.

columns.Name: BASE_DEFINITION_NAME
columns.Comments: Base Name of the Definition.

columns.Name: RETENTION_DAYS
columns.Comments: Number of days the extract needs to be retained.

columns.Name: PURGE_LEVEL
columns.Comments: Purge level to indicate files being purged.

columns.Name: ESS_REQ_ID
columns.Comments: Request identifier for the purge process.

columns.Name: START_TIME
columns.Comments: Start time for the sub process.

columns.Name: END_TIME
columns.Comments: End time for the sub process.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
